CookieBanner.title: We value your privacy
CookieBanner.description: We use cookies to analyze website traffic, customize content, and improve your user experience on our platform.

HomePage.title: Dominate Teamfight Tactics
HomePage.description: Elevate your game with professional 1-on-1 coaching, detail-oriented VOD reviews, and customized sessions tailored to your playstyle.
HomePage.servicesSubtitle: Tailored training programs designed to break your hardstuck ranks and unleash your tactical potential.
HomePage.processSubtitle: A simple 3-step process to begin your journey toward Challenger.
HomePage.reviewsSubtitle: Real players, real results. See how our coaching translates into direct rank improvements.
HomePage.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of players who have reached their dream divisions through structured practice and expert guidance.
HomePage.serviceLiveDesc: A live-screened game where a pro coach guides your decisions in real-time, focusing on roll timings, board transitions, and econ.
HomePage.serviceVodDesc: Submit a recording of your game. Your coach will record a detailed, video analysis highlighting key errors, positioning flaws, and positioning adjustments.
HomePage.serviceTeamDesc: Interact with other competitive players, share team comps, review patches, and participate in community tournaments.
HomePage.step1Desc: Choose between real-time Live Sessions, detailed VOD Reviews, or structured multi-session plans.
HomePage.step2Desc: Access the availability calendar, pick a convenient date/time, and complete your reservation securely via Stripe.
HomePage.step3Desc: Connect with your coach, dive deep into the session, and apply the custom gameplan to dominate your lobbies.

FAQPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our coaching platform, booking process, and safety policies.
FAQPage.q1: How does the coaching session take place?
FAQPage.a1: Coaching is conducted via Discord. For Live Sessions, you will stream your gameplay in a voice call. For VOD Reviews, you will upload your game link (e.g., YouTube or Twitch), and the coach will send you a recorded review within 48 hours.
FAQPage.a2: No, we strictly do NOT offer account boosting or shared-account services. We focus entirely on teaching and self-improvement (Coaching, VOD Review, Live Sessions). This ensures absolute safety for your account and complies fully with Riot Games' Terms of Service.
FAQPage.q3: Can I cancel or reschedule a booked session?
FAQPage.a3: Yes, you can reschedule or cancel a session up to 24 hours before it starts directly from your dashboard. Cancellations made within this window will receive a full refund.
FAQPage.q4: Which ranks is this coaching suitable for?
FAQPage.a4: Our platform accommodates players of all skill levels, from Iron to Grandmaster. Our coaches specialize in tailoring their lessons to the student's current skill set, whether you are learning basic economics or advanced positioning.
FAQPage.a5: Absolutely. All transactions are securely processed through Stripe Checkout. We do not store any credit card information on our servers.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.subtitle: Have any questions or need custom assistance? Reach out to us, and we'll reply as soon as possible.
ContactPage.name: Your Name

ContactPage.infoDesc: Prefer instant messaging? Hop onto our Discord server to chat with support or connect with coaches directly.

LoginPage.title: Access TFT Coaching
LoginPage.subtitle: Sign in to manage your sessions, view VOD reviews, and track your rank progression.

LegalPages.termsSubtitle: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using our platform.
LegalPages.privacySubtitle: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and share your personal information.
LegalPages.termsContent: Welcome to TFT-Coaching. By accessing our website, booking coaching services, or registering an account, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. 1. Services Provided: We provide educational coaching, VOD reviews, and real-time guidance for Teamfight Tactics. 2. Code of Conduct: Students are expected to treat coaches with respect. Any form of harassment, toxicity, or hate speech will result in immediate termination of services without a refund. 3. Compliance with Riot Games: We strictly do not provide boosting services. We only provide instruction. Users are responsible for their own Riot accounts. 4. Refund Policy: Bookings can be rescheduled or cancelled for a full refund up to 24 hours prior to the session.
LegalPages.privacyContent: At TFT-Coaching, we respect your privacy. This policy outlines how we handle your data. 1. Information We Collect: When you log in with Riot Games (RSO) or credentials, we receive basic profile information (username, email, rank). 2. How We Use Information: We use your data to manage bookings, sync stats from the Riot API, and customize your dashboard experience. 3. Data Protection: We employ industry-standard encryption to protect your data. Payment details are handled entirely by Stripe, and we do not store credit card info on our systems. 4. Cookies: We use cookies to maintain your session state and save language preferences.
LegalPages.cookiesSubtitle: Learn how we use cookies and tracking technologies to enhance your experience.
LegalPages.cookiesContent: This Cookies Policy explains how TFT-Coaching uses cookies and similar technologies. 1. What are cookies: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. 2. How we use them: We use cookies to maintain your login sessions, remember language preferences, and analyze general traffic to improve performance. 3. Managing cookies: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings, though some features of the site (like the login dashboard) may not function properly without them.
